_comment: PINNED COPY of the console.json shape contract — the version of the cross-repo feed contract THIS dashboard was built against. The CANONICAL contract lives in the producer repo: https://github.com/menno420/superbot/blob/main/botsite/data/console_data_contract.json (superbot PR #1884; producer-side parity + fail-closed checks run in superbot's CI). The /console page fetches superbot's committed botsite/data/console.json over raw GitHub and verifies at render time that the feed's meta.schema_version equals this file's version and that every top_level family is present — a mismatch renders an honest schema-drift banner instead of a silently wrong page (the BUG-0022 class). To upgrade: sync this copy from the canonical file, adapt the templates to the new shape, and update the fixture in dashboard/tests/test_dashboard.py in the same commit.
